name: AI Trading Radar v2.0.1
body:
## AI Trading Radar v2.0.1

### Bug fixes
- Fixed startup failure caused by missing `VERSION_TUPLE` version metadata.
- Fixed a dashboard state snapshot syntax error in the Windows executable.
- Corrected the default GitHub update repository to `dimaslukman-rgb/ai-trading-radar`.

### Packaging
- Windows installer: `AITradingRadar_Setup_v2.0.1.exe`
- Local proprietary `tools` are excluded from the executable and public source release.
